summary: BYOK (Bring Your Own Key) Setup Wizard and Credit Alert System testing completed. All 17 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend SetupWizard component tested with all 4 steps working correctly. CreditAlertBanner component verified (not visible when balances are OK).
critical_code_review_comments: All BYOK endpoints properly require authentication (401/403 for unauthenticated requests)
Twilio verification correctly returns balance and currency for valid credentials
ElevenLabs verification has proper fallback to /v1/voices when key lacks user_read permission
Credentials are encrypted using Fernet cipher before storage
Integration status endpoint correctly returns twilio_connected and elevenlabs_connected booleans
Balances endpoint fetches real-time data from Twilio and ElevenLabs APIs
SetupWizard component has proper data-testid attribute for testing
CreditAlertBanner only shows when balances are low (Twilio <$10 or ElevenLabs <20%)

test_credentials.elevenlabs_key: (loaded from ELEVENLABS_API_KEY env var, lacks user_read permission)

seed_data_creation: Created temporary test user byok_wizard_test@test.com with setup_wizard_completed=false for SetupWizard testing (deleted after test)
context_for_next_testing_agent: BYOK integration endpoints fully tested. All 5 endpoints working: verify-twilio, verify-elevenlabs, save integrations, status, balances. SetupWizard shows for users with setup_wizard_completed=false. CreditAlertBanner polls /api/settings/integrations/balances every 5 minutes and shows alerts when Twilio balance <$10 or ElevenLabs credits <20%.

tests: Returns valid=true and balance for valid credentials
Returns valid=false for invalid credentials
Requires authentication (401 for unauthenticated)
Validates required fields (422 for missing auth_token)
Returns valid=true for valid API key (with fallback to /v1/voices)
Returns valid=false for invalid API key
Requires authentication (401 for unauthenticated)
Validates required api_key field (422 for missing)
Saves encrypted Twilio credentials
Saves encrypted ElevenLabs credentials
Saves both integrations together
Requires authentication (401 for unauthenticated)
Returns twilio_connected and elevenlabs_connected booleans
Returns twilio_phone_number and byok_updated_at
Requires authentication (401 for unauthenticated)
Returns real-time Twilio balance with low indicator
Returns ElevenLabs credits (or error for limited key)
Requires authentication (401 for unauthenticated)
Shows for users with setup_wizard_completed=false
Step 1 (Welcome) displays cost comparison and setup overview
Step 2 (Twilio) has Account SID, Auth Token, Phone Number fields
Step 3 (ElevenLabs) has API Key field and plan recommendations
Step 4 (Complete) shows summary with 'You're All Set!'
Navigation between steps works (Continue, Back, Skip for now)
Not visible when balances are OK (Twilio >$10, ElevenLabs >20%)
Has data-testid='credit-alert-banner' for testing
Has dismiss buttons with data-testid='dismiss-alert-{id}'
Complete flow: verify -> save -> check status -> get balances
